+++
title = "Local Groups Unite to Promote Community Energy Initiatives in Hastings & Rye"
date = "2026-03-07"
author = "Sarah Jenkins, Chief Reporter"
categories = ["Community"]
tags = ["Hastings","Rye","Community Energy","Renewable Energy"]
draft = false
+++

Local groups across Hastings and Rye have joined forces to advocate for a community-led approach to energy production, aiming to unlock the potential of renewable resources at scale. The initiative seeks to empower residents by fostering local ownership of renewable energy projects such as solar panels and wind turbines.

Supporters believe that such initiatives not only contribute to reducing carbon emissions but also enhance economic growth in the area through job creation and investment opportunities. Community members are encouraged to participate in upcoming discussions and workshops scheduled throughout Hastings and Rye, where they can learn more about how to get involved and benefit from these projects.

---
**Source:** [Original Article](https://news.google.?oc=5)
